title: BUG #17549: wrong index scan plan with RLS
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE def (x INTEGER, y TEXT, z BOOLEAN DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO def SELECT CAST((ABS(RANDOM() % 10000)) AS INTEGER), CAST((ABS(RANDOM() % 10000)) AS TEXT), (RANDOM() > 0.5);
CREATE INDEX idx_def ON def(x, LOWER(y));
CREATE TABLE app_settings (key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT);
key_bug_features: RLS restricts index usage with non-leak-proof functional index
